M0474_UNOBS_STAULC (M0474) Unobservable Stasis Ulcer Does patient have at least one stasis ulcer that cannot be observed due to nonremovable dressing? 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0476_STA_PRB_STAU (M0476) Status of Most Problematic Stasis Ulcer Status of most problematic stasis ulcer. 01 = Fully granulating
02 = Early/partial granulation
03 = Not healing
NA = No observable ulcer/wound CHAR 2 x x
